name: lemniscus
description: Local Apple Health MCP server. Query your heart rate, steps, sleep, workouts, and more — all data stays on your machine.

data_directory.title: Health Data Folder
data_directory.description: Folder containing your Apple Health export.xml file

tools.name: list_metrics
tools.description: List all available health metrics with counts and date ranges

tools.name: query_readings
tools.description: Get individual health readings filtered by metric and date range

tools.name: get_summary
tools.description: Aggregated health statistics grouped by month or year

tools.name: reindex
tools.description: Re-scan data folder and index new Apple Health exports
